content: The connection to Chrome could not be established. I am unable to navigate to the YouTube video. Please ask the user to enable remote debugging in Chrome by navigating to: `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` and checking the appropriate settings, or ensuring that Chrome is running with debugging enabled. Once Chrome is running with debugging enabled, I can retry the task.

toolCall.name: send_message
